results.notes: Bespoke: enumerate battlefield, emit ZONE_CHANGE→exile for each creature or Spacecraft.
Bespoke: count creatures+Spacecraft you control, deal X=2+count damage to each chosen target.

results.engine_gap: Type-restricted counterspell; auto-pattern only matches 'counter target spell' (not 'counter target artifact or enchantment spell')
results.notes: Bespoke counter resolve emitting ZONE_CHANGE→graveyard with reason=countered. Type-restriction enforcement is targeting-time; we just resolve.

results.engine_gap: Surveil X with X dynamically computed; auto-matcher only handles literal 'surveil N'
results.notes: Bespoke: count caster's artifacts and emit SURVEIL with that amount + DRAW 3.

results.engine_gap: Kicker alt cost + look-top-X-pick-1-or-2 with X dynamic by lands
results.notes: Kicker is unimplemented; the dynamic X look + reveal+keep is also a separate gap.

results.engine_gap: Cost reduction 'if it targets a blocking creature' is a separate cost-side gap; resolve effect itself wires cleanly
results.notes: Bespoke: PT_MODIFICATION +2/+0 + GRANT_KEYWORD indestructible (both end_of_turn) for each chosen target.

results.engine_gap: Void cost-reduction is a separate cost-side gap; resolve effect (reveal hand, choose nonland, discard) wires cleanly
results.notes: Bespoke: REVEAL_HAND + DISCARD with chosen_by=caster + nonland_only. Void cost-reduction unimplemented.

results.engine_gap: Reanimation rider 'return a creature card put into a graveyard this way' (X>=6) requires this-way tracking which is a gap; X-cost lookup uses stack_manager.x_value
results.notes: Bespoke: sweep creatures with toughness<=X (via get_toughness) + LIFE_CHANGE -X. Reanimation rider omitted.
Bespoke: emit DAMAGE to target = its power; doubled if it has flying. Damage source set to target itself.

results.engine_gap: Auto-matcher's pump regex requires '+N/+M until end of turn' adjacent; the 'and gains first strike and reach until end of turn' wording breaks the regex
results.notes: Bespoke: PT_MODIFICATION +3/+0 + GRANT_KEYWORD first_strike + GRANT_KEYWORD reach (all end_of_turn).

results.engine_gap: Gain-control-until-end-of-turn (no general control-change mechanic) + Spacecraft charge-counter add-then-remove
results.notes: Control-change is a major gap; charge counters on Spacecraft also need add/remove timing.

results.engine_gap: Cheat-into-play from hand + grant 3 abilities (haste, ETB-like leaves trigger, end-step sacrifice) on the entered permanent
results.notes: Cheat-into-play with custom abilities granted post-entry is multi-step; granted ETB+sac stays attached.

results.engine_gap: Additional cost choice (creature you control OR warped creature card you own in exile) + dynamic damage = chosen card's power
results.notes: Mixed-zone target picker for additional cost is unimplemented; warped-card concept available via warp subsystem but not for spell additional costs.

results.engine_gap: Multi-target spell where second target receives damage equal to first target's (post-pump) power; ordered target groups
results.notes: Bespoke: PT_MODIFICATION +1/+0 + GRANT_KEYWORD vigilance on first non-player target; emit DAMAGE to second non-player target with amount = power+1 (since pump is simultaneous).

results.engine_gap: Multi-zone-source target group ordering: group 0 = nonland permanents in graveyard → hand; group 1 = lands in graveyard → battlefield tapped
results.notes: Bespoke: ZONE_CHANGE for group 0 (gy→hand) + ZONE_CHANGE for group 1 (gy→battlefield, tapped=True). Type filtering is targeting-time.

results.engine_gap: Choose odd-or-even (binary modal); destroy all by parity; gain control of all creatures EOT (control-change is a major gap)
results.notes: Engine has no general control-change-until-end-of-turn primitive.

results.engine_gap: Multi-target 'any number of target players each' ordering; mill half-library is computed live
results.notes: Bespoke: sweep all creatures + for each chosen player target, MILL with amount = library_size//2.
Bespoke: MILL target player with amount = caster's current life total.
